name: vocal-and-singing-training
description: Self-paced Vocal & Singing Training practice site

scripts.test:redteam: node qa/redteam-static.mjs && playwright test tests/max-effort-journeys.spec.js tests/redteam-client.spec.js tests/space-assist.spec.js tests/hit-targets.spec.js tests/format-hit-clicks.spec.js tests/sh-air-detect.spec.js tests/billing.spec.js tests/auth.spec.js tests/i18n-copy.spec.js tests/viewport-overflow.spec.js --reporter=line
scripts.test:ui-forensics: HEADED=1 SLOWMO=50 LIVE_SECS=10 playwright test tests/exercise-live-forensics.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --reporter=line
scripts.test:ui-forensics:headed: HEADED=1 SLOWMO=50 LIVE_SECS=10 playwright test tests/exercise-live-forensics.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --reporter=line
scripts.test:ui-forensics:watch: HEADED=1 SLOWMO=80 LIVE_SECS=10 FORENSICS_LIMIT=2 FORENSICS_IDS=v1-diction,s15-sh-air-ladder playwright test tests/exercise-live-forensics.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --reporter=line
scripts.test:headed-forensics:watch: HEADED=1 SLOWMO=100 FORENSICS_FORMATS=desktop,mobile,fullscreen FORENSICS_LIMIT=2 playwright test tests/headed-exercise-forensics.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:click-ui-live: HEADED=1 MIC_HELP=0 SLOWMO=55 playwright test tests/click-ui-live-log.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --workers=1 --reporter=line
scripts.test:click-ui-live:mic-help: HEADED=1 MIC_HELP=1 SLOWMO=55 playwright test tests/click-ui-live-log.spec.js --headed --project=chromium --workers=1 --reporter=line

author: PillB
